summary: Plan 03 is executable after repair: the target gate is fail-closed and pre-connection, initialization is two-phase across both databases, one-shot engine and subprocess lifecycles are bounded, filesystem probes leave no persistent state, and real concurrent CLI behavior has zero-skip PostgreSQL coverage.

review_basis.head: ca7a4435c9d5a008a2289acf54af9df21fae2735
review_basis.baseline: Current repository, repaired Plans 01 and 02, AWS ECS readiness spec, Plan 10 runbook plan, SQLAlchemy URL behavior, CLI entrypoint, and testcontainer marker layout.

resolved_findings.resolution: Deleted the duplicate advisory target parser; Plan 03 now consumes require_distinct_postgres_targets and blocks before engine construction.
Invalid Plan 01 database contracts and target conflicts now prevent all database probes and initialization.
Initialization now waits for both read-only database states and one complete settings, filesystem, dependency, and plugin eligibility decision.
Both engine paths use postgres_engine_kwargs, reuse one connection for SELECT plus each probe, and dispose every one-shot engine in finally.
DatabaseTargetConflictError, SchemaInitBusyError, and SchemaLockCleanupError have separate static redacted outcomes.
The required filesystem permission probe uses an exclusive unpredictable tempfile, same-descriptor I/O, immediate unlink, cleanup in finally, and never creates directories in either mode.
PostgreSQL coverage invokes the actual CLI, launches two bounded concurrent subprocesses, proves final CURRENT state, and treats unavailable Docker or skips as BLOCKED.
The plan now includes focused, subsystem, Ruff, format, strict mypy, diff-check, and Wardline gates with exact-path staging.
SQLAlchemy test URLs use render_as_string(hide_password=False), avoiding masked credentials in subprocess environments.
Plan 10 now explicitly provisions the mounted data, payload, and blob directories before doctor runs.

verification: git diff --check on Plan 03 and its cross-plan handoffs
stale unsafe design search for duplicate target parser, directory creation, broad staging, clean Docker skip, and Engine-or-Connection initializer callback
current Plan 02 initializer and target-helper signatures reconciled
current SQLAlchemy URL rendering and CLI module entrypoint reconciled
four-lens post-repair review reached GO with no remaining blockers

review_history.summary: Initial review found fail-open target comparison, unsafe sequencing and filesystem behavior, engine leaks, missing lock-domain handling, and non-CLI/skip-permitted integration coverage.
